title: Catha rigida

Further studies are required to fully explore the medicinal uses of Catha rigida and its potential applications in traditional medicine.

Catha rigida, also known as the African Rue, is a flowering plant species within the Rubiaceae family. It is believed to have various health benefits, including potential uses as an anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant agent. The bioactive constituents of Catha rigida are thought to include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
